description_long: This stereo sound system features a sleek, rectangular body with gently rounded edges and a prominent front-facing speaker grille. The grille covers most of the front surface and appears to be made of a fine, perforated metal mesh, framed by a glossy black plastic border. The sides and rear of the unit are smooth and unadorned, with a consistent black finish that gives it a modern, minimalist appearance. The top and bottom surfaces are flat, allowing for stable placement on various surfaces. No visible buttons, control panels, or ports are present on the exterior, suggesting a streamlined design. The overall build suggests durability and a focus on delivering high-quality audio output in urban environments.
description: A modern, rectangular stereo sound system with a large front speaker grille and a smooth, glossy black exterior. The design is minimalist, with no visible controls or ports.
description_view_0: The front view shows a large, perforated speaker grille framed by a glossy black border, dominating the face of the unit.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a smooth, featureless black surface with a slight taper towards the bottom.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a plain, flat black surface with no visible features or openings.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing a smooth, unadorned black surface with a subtle taper.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: The speaker grille features a fine, uniform perforated mesh pattern with small, evenly spaced circular holes, framed by a smooth, glossy border.
